meaning: n.玉米,黄色adj.玉米色的,黄色的
examples: Wheat, maize and sugar beet are planted in rotation.
Sugarcane needs less land than maize.
We can grow sorghum or maize on this plot.
Once there, they bartered their maize, vegetables, crafts and fruit for produce not available at home.
Mr. KAGWANJA: It's only focusing on the food that is acquired, I mean the maize.
